title: The Girdle.
content:
Aphrodite preserves her beauty concealed by her girdle;
    That which lends her her charms is what she covers her shame.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Girdle.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
